nodes.name: 鹟科
nodes.summary: 鹟科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括方尾鶲、Yellow-eyed black flycatcher、Southern black flycatcher等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rusty-breasted wheatear
nodes.summary: Rusty-breasted wheatear（Rusty-breasted wheatear，学名 Oenanthe frenata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于鹟科、衣索比亞高原。

nodes.name: 衣索比亞高原
nodes.summary: 衣索比亞高原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括埃及雁、黑冕鶴、肉垂鹤等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2016 |title=Oenanthe frenata |volume=2016 |article-number=e.T103774137A104221676 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2016-3.RLTS.T103774137A104221676.en |access-date=3 July 2024}} | taxon = Oenanthe frenata | authority = (Heuglin, 1869) | synonyms = }} The rusty-breasted wheatear (Oenanthe frenata) is a species of bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is native to the Ethiopian Highlands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2016 |title=Oenanthe frenata |volume=2016 |article-number=e.T103774137A104221676 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2016-3.RLTS.T103774137A104221676.en |access-date=3 July 2024}} | taxon = Oenanthe frenata | authority = (Heuglin, 1869) | synonyms = }} The rusty-breasted wheatear (Oenanthe frenata) is a species of bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is native to the Ethiopian Highlands
